title: Pseudo Anonymised Other Lifestyle Factors from Questionnaire R0
description: Variables from the other lifestyle factors section of the first round of questionnaire for The Generations Study about the participant's history of other activities including exercise and travel. This data has been pseudo-anonymised by removing any personal identifiable information (PII) and shifting dates from their original data.

R0_SleepTimeWeekdayHour.x-question: Over the last year, what time do you usually go to sleep on weekdays? - hour
R0_SleepTimeWeekdayHour.description: Usual hour of going to sleep on weekdays in the last year.

R0_SleepTimeWeekdayMinute.x-question: Over the last year, what time do you usually go to sleep on weekdays? - minute
R0_SleepTimeWeekdayMinute.description: Usual minute of going to sleep on weekdays in the last year.

R0_SleepTimeAMPM.x-question: Cross the box indicating AM PM or Midnight for when you usually go to sleep on weekdays.
R0_SleepTimeAMPM.description: Clock period (AM, PM, or midnight) for usual weekday bedtime in the last year.

R0_WakeTimeHour.x-question: Over the last year, what time do you usually wake up? - hour
R0_WakeTimeHour.description: Usual hour of waking up on weekdays in the last year.

R0_WakeTimeMinute.x-question: Over the last year, what time do you usually wake up? - minute
R0_WakeTimeMinute.description: Usual minute of waking up on weekdays in the last year.

R0_WakeTimeAMPM.x-question: Cross the box indicating AM PM or Midnight for when you usually wake up on weekdays.
R0_WakeTimeAMPM.description: Clock period (AM, PM, or noon) for usual weekday wake-up time in the last year.

R0_SleepDurationHours.x-question: Over the last year, how many hours do you usually sleep per night? - hours
R0_SleepDurationHours.description: Typical number of hours slept per night over the last year.

R0_SleepDurationMinutes.x-question: Over the last year, how many hours do you usually sleep per night? - minutes
R0_SleepDurationMinutes.description: Additional minutes slept per night over the last year, beyond whole hours.

R0_RoomDarkness.x-question: How dark is the room when you sleep?
R0_RoomDarkness.description: Usual level of darkness in the participantâ€™s bedroom while sleeping at their current age.
x-enumDescriptions: 2: Light enough to see across the room, but not read.
3: Light enough to see your hand in front of you, but not across the room.
4: Too dark to see your hand, or you wear a mask.
5: Light enough to read AND light enough to see across the room, but not read.
6: Light enough to read AND light enough to see your hand in front of you, but not across the room.
7: Light enough to see your hand in front of you, but not across the room AND too dark to see your hand, or you wear a mask.
8: Light enough to see across the room, but not read AND too dark to see your hand, or you wear a mask.
9: Light enough to read AND too dark to see your hand, or you wear a mask.

R0_RoomDarknessAge20.x-question: How dark was the room when you slept when you were 20 years old?
R0_RoomDarknessAge20.description: Reported level of darkness in the bedroom when the participant was about 20 years old.
x-enumDescriptions: 3: Light enough to see across the room, but not read.
4: Light enough to see your hand in front of you, but not across the room.
5: Too dark to see your hand, or you wore a mask.
6: Light enough to read AND light enough to see across the room, but not read.
7: Light enough to see your hand in front of you, but not across the room AND too dark to see your hand, or you wore a mask.
8: Light enough to see across the room, but not read AND too dark to see your hand, or you wore a mask.
9: Light enough to read AND too dark to see your hand, or you wore a mask.

NightWakeups.description: Details of night wakeups at study entry and age 20.

R0_NightWakeup_Num.description: Instance of either recent in reference to study entry or when the particpant was 20 years old.

R0_NightWakeups.x-question: How many times per night did you wake up and put the lighs on or go into a bright room?
R0_NightWakeups.description: Average number of times per night in recent months, or at age 20, the participant woke up and went into bright light.

R0_PerceivedStress.x-question: Do you feel that you have experienced stress over the last 5 years?
R0_PerceivedStress.description: Participantâ€™s overall perception of how much stress they have experienced in the last 5 years.

R0_StressEventDeathPartner.x-question: Have you experienced any major stressful life events in the last 5 years? - Death of a husband or long-term partner
R0_StressEventDeathPartner.description: Whether the participant experienced the death of a husband or long-term partner in the last 5 years.
x-enumDescriptions: 1: Death of a husband or long-term partner.

R0_StressEventPersonalIllness.x-question: Have you experienced any major stressful life events in the last 5 years? - Serious personal illness or injury
R0_StressEventPersonalIllness.description: Whether the participant experienced a serious personal illness or injury in the last 5 years.

R0_StressEventDeathRelative.x-question: Have you experienced any major stressful life events in the last 5 years? - Death of a child, parent or other close relative
R0_StressEventDeathRelative.description: Whether the participant experienced the death of a child, parent or other close relative in the last 5 years.
x-enumDescriptions: 3: Death of a child, parent or other close relative.

R0_StressEventJobLoss.x-question: Have you experienced any major stressful life events in the last 5 years? - Loss of a job
R0_StressEventJobLoss.description: Whether the participant experienced loss of a job in the last 5 years.

R0_StressEventDivorce.x-question: Have you experienced any major stressful life events in the last 5 years? - Divorce or separation
R0_StressEventDivorce.description: Whether the participant experienced divorce or separation in the last 5 years.

R0_StressEventOther.x-question: Have you experienced any major stressful life events in the last 5 years? - Other life event that you found very stressful
R0_StressEventOther.description: Whether the participant experienced another major life event they found very stressful in the last 5 years.
x-enumDescriptions: 6: Other life event that was very stressful.

R0_StressEventDeathFriend.x-question: Have you experienced any major stressful life events in the last 5 years? - Death of a close friend
R0_StressEventDeathFriend.description: Whether the participant experienced the death of a close friend in the last 5 years.

R0_AircrewTravelHistory.x-question: Have you worked as aircrew or traveled frequently by air for a year or more?
R0_AircrewTravelHistory.description: Whether the participant has ever worked as aircrew or travelled frequently by air for at least one year.

R0_AircrewTravelStartYear.x-question: If yes, what years did work as aircrew or travel frequently by air? - from year
R0_AircrewTravelStartYear.description: Calendar year the participant started working as aircrew or travelling frequently by air.

R0_AircrewTravelEndYear.x-question: If yes, what years did work as aircrew or travel frequently by air? - to year
R0_AircrewTravelEndYear.description: Calendar year the participant stopped working as aircrew or travelling frequently by air.

R0_AircrewTravelCurrent.x-question: Check this if you are still working as aircrew or travelling frequently by air?
R0_AircrewTravelCurrent.description: Indicator that the participant is currently working as aircrew or travelling frequently by air.
x-enumDescriptions: 1: Still working as aircrew or travelling frequently by air.

R0_AirborneHoursWeek.x-question: On average, how many hours per week or month were you airborne during this period? - hours per week
R0_AirborneHoursWeek.description: Average number of hours per week the participant was airborne during the aircrew/travel period.

R0_AirborneHoursMonth.x-question: On average, how many hours per week or month were you airborne during this period? - hours per month
R0_AirborneHoursMonth.description: Average number of hours per month the participant was airborne during the aircrew/travel period.

R0_MediumFlightsMonth.x-question: During this period, how many flights per month did you make that lasted between 5 and 9 hours?
R0_MediumFlightsMonth.description: Average number of 5-9 hour flights per month during the aircrew/travel period.

R0_LongFlightsMonth.x-question: During this period, how many flights per month did you make that lasted 10 or more hours?
R0_LongFlightsMonth.description: Average number of flights lasting 10 or more hours per month during the aircrew/travel period.

R0_FlightsCrossEquatorMonth.x-question: During this period, how many flights per month did you make that were crossing the equator?
R0_FlightsCrossEquatorMonth.description: Average number of monthly flights crossing the equator during the aircrew/travel period.

R0_TransAtlanticFlightsMonthly.x-question: During this period, how many flights per month did you make that were Trans-Atlantic but not crossing the equator?
R0_TransAtlanticFlightsMonthly.description: Average number of monthly Trans-Atlantic flights (not crossing the equator) during the aircrew/travel period.

R0_TransPacificFlightsMonthly.x-question: During this period, how many flights per month did you make that were Trans-Pacific but not crossing the equator?
R0_TransPacificFlightsMonthly.description: Average number of monthly Trans-Pacific flights (not crossing the equator) during the aircrew/travel period.

R0_MediumTimeDiffFlights.x-question: During this period, how many journeys per month did you make that had a time difference between 5 and 9 hours?
R0_MediumTimeDiffFlights.description: Average number of monthly journeys with a 5-9 hour time difference during the aircrew/travel period.

R0_LargeTimeDiffFlights.x-question: During this period, how many journeys per month did you make that had a time difference of 10 or more hours?
R0_LargeTimeDiffFlights.description: Average number of monthly journeys with a time difference of 10 hours or more during the aircrew/travel period.

R0_AntiperspirantDeodorantUse.x-question: Have you ever regularly used antiperspirants or deodorants? - Anti-perspirant deodorant
R0_AntiperspirantDeodorantUse.description: Whether the participant has ever regularly used anti-perspirant deodorant products under the arms.

R0_AntiperspirantOnlyUse.x-question: Have you ever regularly used antiperspirants or deodorants? - Anti-perspirant only
R0_AntiperspirantOnlyUse.description: Whether the participant has ever regularly used anti-perspirant products only (not combined with deodorant).

R0_DeodorantOnlyUse.x-question: Have you ever regularly used antiperspirants or deodorants? - Deoderant only
R0_DeodorantOnlyUse.description: Whether the participant has ever regularly used deodorant-only products under the arms.

R0_TalcUse.x-question: Have you ever regularly used antiperspirants or deodorants? - Talc products
R0_TalcUse.description: Whether the participant has ever regularly used talc products under the arms.

R0_AircrewTravel_Start_Shifted.name: R0_AircrewTravel_Start_Shifted
R0_AircrewTravel_Start_Shifted.description: Derived and pseudo-anonymised year. The date is anchored at 1 July (day 1, month 7) of the reported year, shifted by a participant-specific offset, and only the year of the shifted date is stored. If the year component is missing the derived value is null.

R0_AircrewTravel_End_Shifted.name: R0_AircrewTravel_End_Shifted
R0_AircrewTravel_End_Shifted.description: Derived and pseudo-anonymised year. The date is anchored at 1 July (day 1, month 7) of the reported year, shifted by a participant-specific offset, and only the year of the shifted date is stored. If the year component is missing the derived value is null.
